text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: ...That was an amazing race, Brian.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You've gotten stronger again—to the point that
no one can catch up.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: No fair!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: No fair! No fair! No fair! I was supposed to win! Not Brian!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna win next time for sure!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Talk about bratty...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... I should've won...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Sigh.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: If that's how you feel, then keep chasing after me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'll race you as many times as it takes. If there's a
race, I'll always be there.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
O-okay! And I won't lose! Because I'll become so
craaazy strong!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Heh. I suppose I should be that honest as well.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to beat you too, Brian. Someday, even
if I can't right now.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Without question.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Okay. Do it then.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Brian... This is your strength.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You dominate the field with astounding
aggression, seizing and reshaping the hearts of
those watching.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Among those hearts, doubtless some were turned
to resignation. But, in truth...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Everyone was captivated by you and your
unparalleled ability...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Each individual praying that they could one day
defeat such strength.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It's the kind of strength that attracts those who
live wholly for racing.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: So much so, even I wish to indulge myself.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...So that's it for this year.
choice_data_list: And what a year it was!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I did.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Heh.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You know I'm not.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'm still hungry. When I think about the new year,
all I can imagine is a new generation of
competition and running more races.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I can barely contain myself.
